name: Steamed Shrimp & Scallops with Orange Vinaigre
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the shrimp and scallops on a plate in a steamer basket.
2. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon each of orange juice and rice vinegar.
3. Place the steamer over boiling water in a wok or large skillet and cover.
4. Cook for 7 to 8 minutes, until the shrimp are cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, stir together remaining orange juice, rice vinegar, sesame oil, mustard, salt, and pepper in a medium bowl.
6. Mix in chopped green onions, dill, and chives.
7. Transfer hot seafood to the bowl with vinaigrette; toss well to coat.
8. Serve warm on lettuce-lined plates. Garnish with chopped pimento if desired.
9. Makes 4 servings.
PER SERVING: calories - 116, protein - 14 g., fat - 4 g., carbohydrate - 4 g., cholesterol - 66 mg., sodium - 395 mg. FROM: Light & Easy Meals from Family Circle Magazine issue August 1992.
